Thanks for taking the time to fill out this bug report!

### Contact Details
How can we get in touch with you if we need more info?
*ex. email@example.com*

### What happened?
Tell us what you see! Also tell us, what did you expect to happen?
*A bug happened!*

### Version
What version of our software are you running?
- 1.0.2 (Default)
- 1.0.3 (Edge)

### Browsers
What browsers are you seeing the problem on?
- Firefox
- Chrome
- Safari
- Microsoft Edge

### Relevant log output
Please copy and paste any relevant log output. This will be automatically formatted into code, so no need for backticks.

### Code of Conduct
By submitting this issue, you agree to follow our [Code of Conduct](https://example.com)
- I agree to follow this project's Code of Conduct
